data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. NARINGAL BOY jumped from this box last time and also the same course and distance to score a Grade 6 win (23.69). Good beginner and aided by the inside draw. Expected to go close again. 7. JALAPENO POPPER turned spotting a big start finishing sixth (30.58) last time in a OPEN at this track. Solid record here winning three races. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Key player if finds best. 2. BOULDER BEACH turned spotting a big start finishing sixth (24.28) last time in a Grade 4/5 at this track. Has ability and can measure up. 6. APOLLO'S SUN made it two minor placings on the trot when beaten third (24.06) in a Grade 4/5 at this track last time out.","runners":[1,7,2,6],"exclusive":false}
